awardEntries.title: Eagle Scout
awardEntries.metaText: Issued August 5, 2020 by Boy Scouts of America
highlights: Held multiple troop leadership roles, including Senior Patrol Leader and Webmaster.
Completed National Youth Leadership Training and later served as an instructor.
Applied EDGE leadership methodology: Educate, Demonstrate, Guide, and Enable.
awardEntries.additionalDescription: As a Boy Scout, I learned the value of strong leadership through multiple Positions of Responsibility: Den Chief, Historian, Web Master, SPL, ASPL, OA Representative, and Junior Assistant Scout Master. I attended NYLT and later returned to staff NYLT. These experiences built practical skills in teamwork, teaching through the EDGE method, patience, social communication, conflict resolution, motivation, and mentoring younger scouts. These lessons continue to shape my professional and personal leadership style.

Attends daily practices to optimize methods for complex security use cases.
Attends lectures from global security experts.

experienceItems.title: Skyblivion Global Project - Interior Level Designer
highlights: Completed 11 detailed interior levels with a global development team.
Tested experimental workloads as the project transitioned to cloud workflows.
Mentored new team members for faster onboarding success.

projectItems.title: XnGine Framework
projectItems.subtitle: MO2 plugin framework for classic XnGine games
projectItems.summary: Personal reverse-engineering and framework engineering project for classic Bethesda XnGine games (Arena, Battlespire, Daggerfall, and Redguard). Implements binary format parsing, BSA archive tooling, save integration, and safer runtime patch workflows for xdelta/IPS/BPS/UPS/PPF pipelines.

projectItems.title: Capstone Client Project: Safe Future Barcode for Good
projectItems.subtitle: Safe Future Foundation | Nonprofit Inventory System
projectItems.summary: Year-long UNF capstone project for Safe Future Foundation, a Jacksonville nonprofit. Built and refined a web-based inventory system with QR item labeling, CSV export, stronger error handling, and client-driven iteration.

projectItems.title: Directed Independent Study
projectItems.subtitle: UNF Cyber Team Readiness, Gap Analysis, and Curriculum Design
projectItems.summary: Directed independent study at UNF focused on cybersecurity team readiness, workflow gaps, leadership continuity, and training structure. Delivered current-state analysis, future-state recommendations, and a penetration testing course proposal.

leadershipEntries.title: Dungeons & Dragons Game Master
highlights: Plans and facilitates recurring sessions, balancing long-term roadmap planning with weekly execution.
